inputs.label: Failure Rate
inputs.businessContext: Number of expected failures per year for the equipment/system.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of expected failures per year for the equipment/system.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekipman/sistem için yıllık beklenen arıza sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Anzahl von Ausfällen pro Jahr für die Anlage/das System.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ekipman/sistem için yıllık beklenen arıza sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número esperado de fallos por año para el equipo/sistema.

inputs.label: Downtime per Failure
inputs.businessContext: Average downtime in hours per failure event.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average downtime in hours per failure event.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Ausfallzeit in Stunden pro Ausfallereignis.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo de inactividad promedio en horas por evento de fallo.

inputs.label: Cost per Downtime Hour
inputs.businessContext: Cost incurred per hour of downtime, including lost production, labor, etc.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost incurred per hour of downtime, including lost production, labor, etc.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Duruş saati başına maliyet (kayıp üretim, işçilik vb.).
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten pro Stunde Ausfallzeit, einschließlich Produktionsausfall, Arbeitskosten usw.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durma saati başına maliyet (kayıp üretim, işçilik vb.).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo incurrido por hora de inactividad, incluyendo producción perdida, mano de obra, etc.

inputs.label: Detection Probability
inputs.businessContext: Probability of detecting a failure before it causes downtime (0 to 1).

businessContext_i18n.en: Probability of detecting a failure before it causes downtime (0 to 1).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Arızanın duruşa neden olmadan önce tespit edilme olasılığı (0-1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wahrscheinlichkeit, einen Ausfall zu erkennen, bevor er zu Ausfallzeiten führt (0 bis 1).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Arızanın duruşa neden olmadan önce algılanma olasılığı (0 ile 1 arası).
businessContext_i18n.es: Probabilidad de detectar un fallo antes de que cause tiempo de inactividad (0 a 1).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
